title: Default outlet water temperature
summary: The default outlet water temperature is 56°C, adjustable between 48°C and 60°C.
evidence_quote: 出水温度 ℃ （默认）56℃，48℃～60℃范围内可调

title: Fault code E0: Water flow detection fault
summary: E0 indicates a water flow detection fault (displayed on main unit).

structured_payload.meaning: 水流检测故障（主机显示）

evidence_quote: E0 水流检测故障（主机显示）

summary: E1 indicates a power phase sequence fault.

summary: E3 indicates an outlet water temperature sensor fault.
